MACD hist +0.55 shows momentum still positive but this level of RSI extension is unsustainable intraday. Price $270.51 at session VWAP ($270.69) — acceptable short entry zone. ATR = $1.19, so 2.5x ATR stop ~$3.00 above entry → SL ~$273.50, TP ~$267.50 (reversion to SMA20 $268.19 area). Expected hold: 3-5h through closing hour momentum. Target exit by 3:45 PM ET.
